message:
feat(freeze): track explicit "use strict" for proper 'this' handling

- Add has_use_strict field to track explicit "use strict" directives
- Pass has_use_strict through frozen function pipeline
- Update push_this handlers to coerce this to globalThis only for non-strict functions
- Update QuickJS-ng patch to serialize has_use_strict to bytecode

This fixes 'this' handling for Node.js compatibility:
- Non-strict functions: undefined/null this → globalThis
- Strict functions: keep this as-is (undefined/null preserved)

Note: Bun bundler strips "use strict" directives, so bundled code
behaves as non-strict. This is correct for CJS output format.
